recommended_ingest_scope: Approve a corpus-v2 ingest policy update that uses this candidate set (or a subset) as the first expansion tranche, then create a new snapshot version, re-embed, re-cluster, and run a zero–bridge-weight ranking before any bridge-weight tuning.
caveats: Dry-run only: no Postgres writes, no snapshot, no embeddings, clustering, or ranking.
Candidate list is not a benchmark and does not validate retrieval or bridge quality.
Old vs new corpus metrics must not be compared as same-pool performance.
